name: Cheese Nut Halibut
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place a 13x9x2-inch baking dish in the preheated oven.
3. Melt 1/2 cup butter in the dish.
4. Lay the halibut on top of the melted butter.
5. Sprinkle garlic powder and dill over the fish.
6. Evenly spread shredded cheddar cheese over the fish.
7. Garnish with almonds, chopped or whole.
8. Bake for 45 minutes or until the fish is easily separated with a fork.
9. Serve 6 portions.
